title: Pinned Columns in Broadcast View
excerpt: While the ability exists to pin item and subitem columns in your board, these columns do not stayed pinned when using the broadcast view. Would love for my pinned columns to stay pinned in this view. It would greatly red…

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: While the ability exists to pin item and subitem columns in your board, these columns do not stayed pinned when using the broadcast view. Would love for my pinned columns to stay pinned in this view. It would greatly reduce the amount of scrolling our users are presented with.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Cari,
Maybe you could use filters or try hiding/collapsing unnecessary columns in the table widget within the dashboard.
It may help make your dashboard more user friendly and reduce scrolling
Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion, Harsh. We have filtered/hid as many columns as we could but still have many columns remaining forcing users to scroll. Which is why having the ability for columns to stayed pinned in the broadcast view comes very important. Please note, this comment is not about a dashboard, but rather the inability to hold pinned columns from a board view to a broadcast view. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009695080-How-to-share-a-board-view-publicly.
